body:
🛡️ God Armour Plugin – Description

God Armour is a powerful and highly customizable Minecraft plugin that introduces legendary, overpowered armor sets with special abilities, unique effects, and advanced protection. Designed for SMP, RPG, PvP, and custom servers, this plugin allows server owners to create divine-level armor that feels rewarding, rare, and exciting.

Each God Armour set grants players enhanced stats, passive abilities, and special effects when worn, with optional full-set bonuses. Everything is fully configurable — from stats and abilities to crafting recipes, permissions, and visuals — allowing perfect balance for any server type.

✨ Key Features

Custom God Armour sets with unique names and lore

Powerful abilities like regeneration, fire immunity, speed, strength, and more

Full-set bonuses when all armor pieces are equipped

Custom crafting recipes or command-based rewards

Particle effects and visual auras

Permission-based access (LuckPerms supported)

Economy support via Vault

Lightweight, optimized, and lag-free

⚔️ Perfect For

Survival SMP servers

RPG & fantasy-based gameplay

PvP arenas and boss rewards

Donator kits and end-game items

🔧 Fully Configurable

Server owners can customize:

Armor stats & toughness

Potion effects & abilities

Crafting recipes

Cooldowns & restrictions

Messages & permissions

🏆 Why God Armour?

God Armour adds true end-game content to your server, giving players something legendary to grind for while keeping full control in the hands of administrators.
